default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off a strategic engagement between Deepgram and GrowthX to boost Deepgram's organic traffic, signups, SEO, and overall market awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Deepgram aims to drive more relevant organic traffic, increase console signups, improve SEO/GEO, and boost awareness in the voice AI space](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Key differentiators: low latency, accuracy, cost-effectiveness, and enterprise-grade scalability](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Focus on positioning Deepgram as the go-to API for voice AI developers and companies building voice-enabled solutions](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Content strategy needs refinement, with opportunities in technical content, comparisons, and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2920.0)

## Topics

### Current Business Priorities and Challenges

  - [Drive more relevant organic traffic to the website](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Increase organic console signups for PLG program (currently \~6,500/week, 85,000 run rate)](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Improve SEO and GEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Boost overall awareness in the voice AI space](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Low conversion rates from signups to PQLs/SQLs/new logos](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Increased competition from new players (e.g., Eleven Labs, Mistral)](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

### Product and Market Positioning

  - [Three core products: Nova 3 (speech-to-text API), Aura 2 (text-to-speech API), and Voice Agent API](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [90% of ARR from speech-to-text, gaining traction in text-to-speech](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Key differentiators: low latency, accuracy, cost-effectiveness, enterprise-grade scalability](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Target market: AI-native companies and technology firms building voice solutions](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Competitive edge: More enterprise-oriented, offering self-hosted deployments and optimized latency](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)

### Use Cases and Customer Segments

  - [Top industries: Healthcare (30%), Call Centers (20%), Sales, Insurance](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Notable use cases: medical transcription, call summarization, sales coaching, claims processing](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Key customers: CVS (via CoreAI), Jack in the Box (pilot), Florida Blue](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [Open-source frameworks integration: LiveKit, PipeCat](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)

### Content and Marketing Strategy

  - [Product content (tutorials, launches) performs well](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2848.0)
  - [Regular publishing of SEO-focused blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
  - [Two newsletters: AI Minds and Deepgram-specific](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)
  - [Competitive ad campaign against Eleven Labs (1,200 signups/week)](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2813.0)
  - [Opportunities: partner content, guest posts, gated content, technical content from internal experts](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2909.0)

### Areas for Improvement

  - [Lack of developer relations team](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2958.0)
  - [Limited technical content from internal experts (PMs, engineers, founders)](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2999.0)
  - [Need for more active social media presence](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=3001.0)
  - [Opportunity for comparison content (e.g., Granola vs. other note-takers, Eleven Labs vs. OpenAI)](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review additional context, documents, and data shared by Deepgram](https://fathom.video/share/CVz3zZHxJH4k1_wLZZBKmCCyY8yW_yWz?tab=summary&timestamp=3443.0)
